name: Gizmek Naganaki, the Sunrise Signaler
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>巧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鳥</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>常世宇受賣長鳴</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>トコヨウズメノナガナキ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: You can Tribute 1 Machine monster whose ATK equals its own DEF; Special Summon from your Deck, 1 Machine monster whose ATK equals its own DEF, with a lower Level than the Tributed monster. You can banish this card from your GY; add to your hand, 1 of your banished face-down Machine monsters whose ATK equals its own DEF. You can only use each effect of "Gizmek Naganaki, the Sunrise Signaler" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute 1 Machine monster whose ATK equals its own DEF; Special Summon from your Deck, 1 Machine monster whose ATK equals its own DEF, with a lower Level than the Tributed monster. You can banish this card from your GY; add to your hand, 1 of your banished face-down Machine monsters whose ATK equals its own DEF. action: Adds banished cards to the hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
